JUDGE L. SING, RPT. M. BURNS, CLK. R. CONTRERAS PLTF. IN PRO PER ATTY. FOR DEFT. DOROTHY ROBBINS 2PM C/C FOR SETTLMNT. CONF. JUDGMNT. FOR PLTF: RESTIT. OF PREMISES. SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE HANDLED ACCORDING TO PROVISIONS OF 1950.5 OF CIVIL CODE. EACH SIDE WAIVE ATTY. FEES AND COSTS. DEFT. TO PREPARE JUDGMNT. DEFT. WAIVES SECURITY DEPOSIT.
